title: 完璧归赵
meaning: 比喻把原物完好地归还本人

scenes.title: 蔺相如出使
scenes.prompt: An envoy traveling with a precious jade, cartoon style, diplomatic mission
scenes.narration: 蔺相如带着和氏璧出使秦国。

scenes.title: 秦王耍赖
scenes.prompt: A king trying to keep the jade without giving cities, cartoon style, tense scene
scenes.narration: 秦王想白白得到宝玉，不肯给城池。

scenes.title: 完璧归赵
scenes.prompt: An envoy safely returning with the jade, cartoon style, triumphant return
scenes.narration: 蔺相如机智勇敢，终于把宝玉完好带回赵国。
